creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I advise against a tiff-devel port. 
we have more than 5000 ports depending on libtiff.so 
creating a conflicting version will cause lot of problems for most users. 

I cleaner solutions would be to update to tiff 4.0, 
The patches are availible since May,  
waiting for a slot to be tested on the cluster.
